channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Tesla Q2 vehicle deliveries are up 25 percent over last year
item.description: The company has been gaining traction in Europe.

item.title: Boeing-owned Wisk Aero accused of firing manager who raised safety concerns
item.description: A former software manager claims Wisk rushed software testing ahead of a crucial 2025 flight test.

item.title: Save $20 on Windscribe VPN with this promo code — here's everything you need to know
item.description: Get a year's protection from one of the fastest VPNs around for less than $50

item.title: 81 million login attempts hit Microsoft 365 accounts as hackers try password-spraying to force entry using stolen credentials and OAuth to bypass authentication
item.description: The attack abused misconfigured conditional access policies to bypass multi-factor authentication protections.

item.title: How to watch Spain vs. Austria online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Spain vs. Austria in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: From lifelike hands to gamified nudges, how technology is reshaping the future of healthcare
item.description: While design is crucial to make prosthetics or robot pants people actually want to wear, lessons from loyalty programs could also incentivize people to visit the doctor. Whether designing a pair of robot pants or a prosthetic limb or a healthcare app, it’s important that people feel they’re getting a personalized upgrade—not just a solution.

item.title: Is Taylor Swift getting married this weekend? Everything we know.
item.description: Taylor Swift wedding rumors are heating up. Here's everything we know about the reported wedding plans, rumored venue, guest list, and what has and hasn't been confirmed.

item.title: Voici la solution la moins chère pour jouer à GTA VI dans de bonnes conditions grâce à cette offre Amazon
item.description: Si vous cherchez une console de dernière génération en promotion, direction Amazon avec la Xbox Series X disponible pour 130 euros de moins.

item.title: OpenAI might give a 5 percent stake to the US government
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman wants to give the U.S. government ownership stock in the AI company

item.title: Le climatiseur PortaSplit que tout le monde s’arrache va revenir en stock : Midea veut livrer en urgence en Europe
item.description: Midea mobilise des trains de marchandises Chine-Europe pour livrer ses climatiseurs mobiles en urgence. Derrière cette course logistique, c'est l'enjeu d'un retour en stock pendant les vagues de canicule.

item.title: How a shark attack on an Alabama teen led to this new U.S.-wide alert system
item.description: Lulu Gribbin survived a shark attack that inspired federal legislation. Lulu Gribbin was 15 when she survived a shark attack off the coast of Florida. She lost her left hand, part of her right leg and almost her life.What she didn’t know when she entered the water on that day in 2024 was that another woman had been bitten by a shark 90 minutes earlier and just 3 miles (4.8 kilometers) down the beach. Had she known about the earlier attack, there is no way she would have been swimming, she said.Gribbin’s story has inspired new federal legislation to authorize emergency alerts to mobile phones ...

item.title: The video game disc is dead
item.description: For decades, to be a gamer was to accumulate a lot of stuff. Consoles, controllers, accessories, weird VR gloves that never worked properly, but mostly the games themselves. Over the years, games have come in every shape and size you can imagine. And now that era appears to be ending. On this episode of The […]

item.title: Sony propose une mise à jour pour ses casques haut de gamme et les joueurs seront ravis
item.description: Sony enrichit son casque WH-1000XM6 ainsi que le modèle 1000X The ColleXion avec une mise à jour logicielle qui active le Gaming Audio Profile (GMAP) du Bluetooth LE Audio, visant une latence bien plus faible en jeu, sous réserve de compatibilité côté source.

item.title: The DEA Plans to Ban Opioid-Like Kratom Compound 7-OH
item.description: The federal agency says it will temporarily schedule the drug, which has been called “gas station heroin,” as a controlled substance—a boon for MAHA and the mainstream kratom industry.

item.title: 'I will quit buying games' — Sony is killing physical discs in 2028 and now unhappy fans are concerned about what it means for game ownership
item.description: Sony's plan to stop producing physical discs by 2028 has spawned an overwhelmingly negative reaction from PlayStation fans.

item.title: Virginia county tells schools, businesses to 'conserve electricity' as AI data center demand hits grid, raises energy prices
item.description: Henrico County in Virginia is facing electricity and water supply constraints, with electricity bills rising 25% this month.

item.title: Expert says GTA 6 pre-orders are a big target for scammers — warns 'scammers don’t need to break into Rockstar or hack the game' to steal your details
item.description: GTA 6 pre-order scams are on the rise and we asked an expert how to keep stay safe.

item.title: How to watch Spain vs Austria: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 as Lamine Yamal's side begin knockout campaign, team news
item.description: Dani Olmo and Pedro Porro start in place of Mikel Merino and Marcos Llorente as Spain take on Austria at the FIFA World Cup 2026. Here's how to watch the last-32 clash for free online and from anywhere.

item.title: Meilleur vélo électrique 2026 : notre sélection pour choisir le VAE qu’il vous faut
item.description: Difficile de s'y retrouver dans la jungle des vélos électriques (VAE). Pour vous aider à choisir celui qu'il vous faut, nous avons testé et sélectionné les meilleurs vélos électriques du marché.

item.title: Pourquoi Xgimi étoffe son catalogue avec deux nouveaux vidéoprojecteurs à ultra courte focale
item.description: Les Xgimi Mira et Mira Pro marquent le retour de la marque chinoise sur le segment des vidéoprojecteurs à ultra courte focale, avec la promesse d’une image 4K jusqu’à 120 pouces, d’un format discret et de prix inférieurs à ceux de la série Aura 2, plus haut de gamme. À seulement quelques centimètres d’un mur ou d’un écran, ils entendent bien défier la concurrence qui s’organise sur ce segment de marché. ...

item.title: La console Asus ROG Xbox Ally perd 150 euros de son prix lors des soldes
item.description: La console PC portable ROG Xbox Ally, résultat d’une alliance entre Microsoft et Asus, n'est pas parfaite. Mais quand elle est en promotion, comme pendant les soldes d'été, on la recommande plus facilement. Vous pouvez donc la trouver à 449 euros au lieu de 599,99 euros sur Amazon, mais aussi Boulanger.

item.title: Fin du physique chez PlayStation : pourquoi Nintendo ne va pas abandonner les joueurs aussi vite que ses concurrents
item.description: Alors que Sony a annoncé la fin proche du jeu vidéo physique et que Microsoft pourrait bien suivre le train en marche, Nintendo serait-il le dernier bastion de résistance ?

item.title: Samsung is pulling the plug on its Vascular Load tracking tool in the US just a year after it launched — but don’t worry, the company is offering an alternative
item.description: Samsung is getting rid of its Vascular Load tool on Galaxy Watch in the US, but it's got another feature to replace it.

item.title: For creative night owls, the 9-to-5 is pointless
item.description: Workers who experience a creative drive after dark may benefit from flexible, asynchronous work models. Most offices run on a 9-to-5 schedule, or one that closely resembles it. But being clocked in doesn’t mean you’re locked in.

item.title: How Trump’s Anthropic whiplash has helped China
item.description: The Commerce Department reversed restrictions on Anthropic’s most powerful models. The bigger problem is that U.S. AI policy still lacks a clear national security framework. Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week via email here....

item.title: YggTorrent : le coup de grâce de la gendarmerie après le piratage qui l’a mis à genoux
item.description: Quatre mois après le piratage destructeur qui avait mis YggTorrent hors ligne, la gendarmerie nationale annonce le démantèlement complet de sa structure administrative. Douze personnes ont été interpellées.
